title: OpenAI o3 Deep Research 助解 376 例罕见病，发现 18 种新诊断
full_text:
Greg Brockman on X: "OpenAI for helping find 18 new diagnoses across 376 previously unsolved medical cases.
Includes diagnosing Kyra, who has been trying to understand her muscle weakness since age 9, with a rare form of myofibrillar myopathy shortly before her 28th birthday. https://t.co/xq4QIvwby4" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Greg Brockman
@gdb
OpenAI for helping find 18 new diagnoses across 376 previously unsolved medical cases.
Includes diagnosing Kyra, who has been trying to understand her muscle weakness since age 9, with a rare form of myofibrillar myopathy shortly before her 28th birthday.
OpenAI
@OpenAI
15h
Together with researchers at Boston Children’s Hospital and Harvard, we published a study in NEJM AI showing how o3 Deep Research helped clinicians revisit previously unsolved rare pediatric disease cases, and find answers for families who had waited years.
00:00
4:37 PM · Jun 18, 2026 70.8K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: OpenAI o3 Deep Research 助解 376 例罕见病，发现 18 种新诊断
discovery_record.discovery_summary: OpenAI 与波士顿儿童医院、哈佛大学合作，在 NEJM AI 发表研究，使用 o3 Deep Research 重新审视 376 例此前未解的罕见儿科疾病案例，帮助找到 18 种新诊断。其中包含一例 Kyra 自 9 岁起出现肌无力的罕见肌原纤维肌病，在她 28 岁生日前不久得到确诊，为等待多年的家庭提供了答案。

key_excerpts.text: OpenAI 与波士顿儿童医院、哈佛大学合作，在 NEJM AI 发表研究，使用 o3 Deep Research 重新审视 376 例此前未解的罕见儿科疾病案例，帮助找到 18 种新诊断。其中包含一例 Kyra 自 9 岁起出现肌无力的罕见肌原纤维肌病，在她 28 岁生日前不久得到确诊，为等待多年的家庭提供了答案。

co/xq4QIvwby4" / X Post Log in Sign up Post Greg Brockman @gdb OpenAI for helping find 18 new diagnoses across 376 previously unsolved medical cases.
